name: my limbus company au thingie
description:
so i came up with this idea like last week, so i want your opinions on it, its still a bit scuffed and WIP, so things will change

Introducing..
LCC, also known as Limbus Company Chains.

A team of sinners consisting of non-human beings deployed to deal with dirty work around the city, such as odd jobs, dealing with distortions, or golden bough retreival.

The Handler - W. Hare, a former Mao Branch member with albinism, a neurotic man who constantly worries for his team. (Literary Source: Alice In Wonderland)

The Sinners

Sinner #1 - Hastur, A once powerful god that has fallen and lost their power, quiet yet egotistical and analytical, prone to reminiscing. (Literary Source: The King In Yellow)

Sinner #2 - Zampano, a being of ever shifting and changing concrete geometry, standoffish and cocky, has a deep hatred for journalists. Literary Source: House Of Leaves)

Sinner #3 - F. Stein, a brutish reanimated corpse, a monster at first glance, but is surprisingly well mannered and gentle, has a deep longing to be seen truly for what he is. (Literary Source: Frankenstein)

Sinner #4 - Prof. Hyde, a deranged and neurotic doctor obessive over his work, tends to indulge in things. (Literary Source: The Strange Case Of Dr Jeykll And Mr Hyde)

Sinner #5 - A.M., a very hateful being, downright insane in verbal and physical mannerisms, do not attempt to reason with. (Literary Source: I Have No Mouth And I Must Scream)

Sinner #6 - Dullahun, a calm yet intimidating being lacking a head, enjoys observing nature. (Literary Source: The Brothers Grimm Fairy Tales)

Sinner #7 - Grendel, epitome of "brawn over brain", very strong yet unintelligent meat eater, enjoys a hearty feast. (Literary Source: Beowulf)

Sinner #8 - Qu, a sociopathic geneticist, obsessive over her work, ethical or not, do not attempt to intervene with her work. (Literary Source: All Tomorrows)

Sinner #9 - Cerberus, a multiheaded canine being, each one having a different personality, acts tough but enjoys pets. (Literary Source: Greek Mythology)

Sinner #10 - Cthulhu, a once powerful being, serving as Hare's right hand man, pretends to be menacing, but truly is just awkward. (LIterary Source: The Cthulhu Mythos
creator: Focussedblocl
